BARD_RELIC_BARDIC_INSPIRATION.title: Bardic Inspiration
BARD_RELIC_BARDIC_INSPIRATION.descriptio:
Whenever you play a [gold]Magic[/gold] or [gold]Song[/gold] card, gain 1 [gold]Harmony[/gold].
At turn start, ALL allies gain [gold]Vigor[/gold] equal to Harmony, then Harmony resets.
BARD_RELIC_BARDIC_INSPIRATION.flavor: A lute that has accompanied the bard for many years
BARD_RELIC_BETTER_INSPIRATION.title: Bardic Inspiration+
BARD_RELIC_BETTER_INSPIRATION.descriptio:
Whenever you play a [gold]Magic[/gold] or [gold]Song[/gold] card, Harmony +1.
At turn start, ALL allies gain [gold]Vigor[/gold] equal to Harmony, then Harmony is set to 2.
BARD_RELIC_BETTER_INSPIRATION.flavor: A lute that has accompanied the bard for many years, now magically maintained
BARD_RELIC_SNAKE_CHARMER_FLUTE.title: Snake Charmer Flute
BARD_RELIC_SNAKE_CHARMER_FLUTE.descripti: On turn 1, add Snake Bite+ to your hand. It gains [gold]Song[/gold].
BARD_RELIC_SNAKE_CHARMER_FLUTE.flavor: A flute obtained from a silent figure, whose tones can charm serpents
BARD_RELIC_VIRTUOSA_VIOLIN.title: Arti's Violin
BARD_RELIC_VIRTUOSA_VIOLIN.description: When you play a [gold]Song[/gold] card, apply 2 [gold]Calamity[/gold] to ALL enemies.
BARD_RELIC_VIRTUOSA_VIOLIN.flavor: A violin taken from a wicked woman. Playing it leaves an inexplicable unease...
